name: RotationUtil
summary: Class used to describe the rotation around the three axes (X,Y,Z) in order to transform a geometry from local to global coordinate system or the other way around.

constructors.name: RotationUtil
constructors.signature: RotationUtil(angle_x: float, angle_y: float, angle_z: float)
constructors.summary: Construct the object by setting all three angles. The angles are given in degrees.
constructors.remarks: Construct the object by setting all three angles. The angles are given in degrees.

params.name: angle_x
params.doc: Rotation angle (degree) around the local x axis

params.name: angle_y
params.doc: Rotation angle (degree) around the local y axis

params.name: angle_z
params.doc: Rotation angle (degree) around the local z axis

methods.name: __repr__
methods.summary: create a string from the object data
methods.remarks: create a string from the object data

methods.name: get_rotation_matrix
methods.summary: Get a 3D transformation matrix (4x4) describing the rotation around the given point by all three angles: x, y and z.
methods.remarks: Get a 3D transformation matrix (4x4) describing the rotation around the given point by all three angles: x, y and z.

params.name: axis_point
params.doc: Rotation point. Defaults to the origin (0,0,0).

properties.name: angle_x
properties.summary: Rotation angle around the X axis (in degrees)

properties.name: angle_y
properties.summary: Rotation angle around the Y axis (in degrees)

properties.name: angle_z
properties.summary: Rotation angle around the Z axis (in degrees)
